call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Good, thanks. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm thinking about consolidating some debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a very common use for our loans.  We can definitely help with that. What kind of debt are we looking at? Customer: Credit card debt, mostly. About 8 grand. Agent: Okay, so a $10,000 Personal Loan at 8.99% would cover that and give you a little extra for, you know, emergencies. The monthly payments would be around $198.  Does that sound manageable? Customer: Hmm, that's… actually pretty good. What are the terms? Agent: It's a 60-month term.  No prepayment penalties.  We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. Customer: Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at 15.5%. Customer: 15.5?! Are you kidding me? My credit is decent. Agent: Well, sir, it's based on several factors.  But it's a great card with rewards… Customer: No, thank you. I'm not interested. And please take me off your list. Agent: Okay, sir. Have a good day. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by Green Bank.  How are you today? Customer: Yeah, hi. I'm good. I'm looking at a home renovation. Agent: Fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.25%.  That's a really competitive rate, especially with your excellent credit. Customer: Okay, that sounds good. What are the repayment options? Agent: We have terms from 36 to 72 months.  A 60-month term would give you monthly payments of around $388.  We also offer a 0.25% discount if you set up automatic payments. Customer: Hmm, automatic payments… I'm not sure. Agent: It's completely optional, but it does save you money.  We can also discuss a slightly shorter term if you'd prefer a higher monthly payment but less interest overall. Customer: Let's stick with the 60 months for now.  What's the next step? Agent: Great! I just need to verify a few details and then we can send over the loan agreement.

Agent: Hello Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering… Customer: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We're just trying to… Customer: (Yelling) I said leave me alone! I'm adding my number to the do-not-call list!  This is ridiculous! *click*

Agent: Hello Mrs. Davis? This is Sarah with Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a personal loan online.  How are you doing today? Customer: Oh, hello dear. A little hard of hearing, so you might have to speak up. Agent: Certainly, Mrs. Davis. We're pre-approving you for a $7,500 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%.  Are you looking to use the funds for anything specific? Customer: Well, my roof is leaking, and it's quite expensive to fix.  I'm on a fixed income, you see. Agent: I understand. A $7,500 Personal Loan at 12.5% would give you manageable monthly payments.  We can discuss different term lengths to find something that fits your budget.  The payments would be around $175 a month. Customer: Oh my. That… that sounds reasonable.  Could you repeat the interest rate, dear? Agent: Certainly. It's 12.5% per annum.  We can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms if you'd like. Customer: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.

Agent: Hi David, this is Mark from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by Travel Rewards.  Are you looking for a new credit card? Customer: Yeah, kinda. I'm trying to build my credit. Agent: Great! We're pre-approving you for a $3,000 Signature Credit Card at 14.25%. It has a good rewards program. Customer: 14.25%? That's… pretty high, isn't it? Agent: It's competitive for someone building credit, sir.  We can offer a lower rate after six months of responsible use. Customer: Hmm. I'll think about it. I'm looking at a few different options. Agent: Absolutely.  We can send you some information about the card's benefits.  Feel free to reach out if you have any questions. Customer: Okay, thanks.

Agent: Hi Linda, this is David from Finance Solutions. Welcome back! I see you've been a valued customer for a few years.  How can I help you today? Customer: Hi David. I'm thinking about a kitchen remodel. It's going to be expensive. Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 6.75%.  That's a fantastic rate, given your excellent credit history. Customer: That sounds good. What are the fees? Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150, and a late payment fee of $25 if a payment is more than 15 days overdue.  There are no prepayment penalties. Customer: Okay, that's reasonable. What's the monthly payment? Agent: With a 60-month term, your monthly payment would be around $290.  We can also explore different term lengths. Customer: No, 60 months is fine.  I'm happy with that. Agent: Great! We can get the paperwork started right away.  I'll just need to verify a few details.  We also offer a small discount if you enroll in automatic payments. Customer: Sure, let's do automatic payments.

Agent: Hello Mr. Lee? This is Sarah with Financial Solutions. We're offering a new… Customer: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number? I never signed up for anything. Agent: Sir, it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving you for a $1,000 Signature Credit Card at 18.5%. Customer: 18.5?! Are you serious? No, thank you. *click*

Agent: Hi Maria, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by Auto Finance.  How are you doing this evening? Customer: I'm okay. I'm looking for a loan to pay off some medical bills. Agent: I'm sorry to hear that. We can definitely help. We're pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.25%. Customer: Hmm, that's not bad. I've been looking at a few options.  My bank offered me a loan at 10%. Agent: That's great! Our rate is even more competitive.  Plus, we have a faster approval process.  And we don't require a physical visit to the branch. Customer: That's good to know. What are the terms? Agent: We offer terms from 24 to 72 months. A 48-month term would give you monthly payments of around $188.  We also have a rewards program where you can earn points on your payments. Customer: Okay. I need to think about it. Can you send me some information? Agent: Absolutely. I'll email you a detailed loan agreement and a comparison chart showing how our rates stack up against other lenders.  Feel free to call me back if you have any questions.

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is Sarah from Finance Solutions. We're offering… Customer: (Sighs heavily) Look, I've told you people three times now, I'm not interested! And I'm going to report you to the authorities if you keep calling me! Where did you even get my number?! Agent: Sir, I apologize… Customer: (Interrupting) Just take me off your list! *click*
